mapper.select: SELECT CNTR_MOBILE_NO ,T1.SVC_CNTR_NO ,T1.CUSTOMER_ID ,T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,T2.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID ,T2.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG T1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO ,CUSTOMER_ID ,CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUB_STATUS <> 'C' ) T2 ON T1.SVC_CNTR_NO = T2.CONTRACT_NUM WHERE UPPER(T1.USERID) = UPPER(#{userId})
SELECT CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{custId}

SELECT AA.USERID , AA.CNTR_MOBILE_NO , AA.SVC_CNTR_NO , AA.SOC , AA.ENGG_MNTH_CNT , AA.RATE_NM , AA.BASE_AMT , AA.RMK , AA.MODEL_NAME , AA.DOBYYYYMMDD
, AA.INTM_SRL_NO , AA.INTM_SRL_NO AS UN_INTM_SRL_NO , AA.MODEL_ID , NVL(AA.DC_AMT, 0) DC_AMT, POINT_ID , AA.SUB_LINK_NAME , AA.USER_SSN AS unUserSSn , AA.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , AA.REMIND_YN , AA.REMIND_PROD_TYPE FROM ( SELECT A.USERID, A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO, D.SVC_CNTR_NO, D.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SOC , NVL((SELECT ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM (SELECT ENGG_MNTH_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )WHERE RNUM = 1 ), 0) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , C.RATE_NM, C.BASE_AMT, C.RMK, C.REMIND_YN, C.REMIND_PROD_TYPE , D.MODEL_NAME , D.DOBYYYYMMDD
, D.INTM_SRL_NO , D.MODEL_ID , '' AS POINT_ID , 0 AS DC_AMT , D.SUB_LINK_NAME , D.USER_SSN , D.CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP B , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP C , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP D WHERE 1=1 AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = A.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND D.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM ) AA

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM --계약번호 , DVC_OFW_AMNT --단말출고가 , INST_ORGIN_AMNT --할부원금 , INST_MNTH_CNT --할부개월수 , ENGG_MNTH_CNT --약정개월수 , MODEL_NAME --단말기 모델 이름 , MODEL_ID --단말기 모델 ID FROM( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM --계약번호 , DVC_OFW_AMNT --단말출고가 , INST_ORGIN_AMNT --할부원금 , INST_MNTH_CNT --할부개월수 , ENGG_MNTH_CNT --약정개월수 , MODEL_NAME --단말기 모델 이름 , MODEL_ID --단말기 모델 ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE RNUM = 1

SELECT SUBSTR(A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO,0,3)||'-'||DECODE(LENGTH(A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO),11,SUBSTR(A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO,4,4),SUBSTR(A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO,5,3)) ||'-'||SUBSTR(A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO,-4,4) AS MOBILE_NO , MODEL_NAME , REP_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY REP_NO, CNTR_MOBILE_NO) AS NO , A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO AS PHONE1 , B.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE B.CONTRACT_NUM=A.SVC_CNTR_NO AND UPPER(A.USERID) = UPPER(#{userId}) AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY REP_NO

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))

SELECT /* Mypage.selectPPSList 충전 내역조회 테이블 */ TES_SEQ , REQ_TYPE , CONTRACT_NUM , RECHARGE_AGENT , RECHARGE , RET_CODE , RET_MSG , RCG_SEQ , O_AMOUNT , O_TES_CHARGE_MAX , O_TES_BASER , O_TES_CHGR , O_TES_MAGICR , O_TES_FSMSR , O_TES_VIDEOR , O_TES_IPVASR , O_TES_IPMAXR , O_TES_SMSM , O_TES_DATAPLUSV , RECHARGE_IP , REQ_DATE , ADMIN_ID FROM PPS_RCG_TES@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND REQ_TYPE = 'ARS_TES_CHARGE' ORDER BY REQ_DATE DESC

SELECT A.SERVICE_TYPE --서비스유형 , A.RATE_CD --요금제코드 , A.APPL_END_DT --적용종료일자 , A.APPL_STRT_DT --적용시작일자 , A.RATE_NM --요금제명 , A.RATE_GRP_CD --요금제그룹코드 , A.PAY_CL_CD --선후불구분 , A.RATE_TYPE --요금제유형( ORG0008 ) , A.DATA_TYPE --데이터유형( ORG0018 ) , A.BASE_AMT --기본료 , A.FREE_CALL_CL_CD --망내외무료통화구분 , A.FREE_CALL_CNT --무료통화건수 , A.NW_IN_CALL_CNT --망내무료통화건수 , A.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT --망외무료통화건수 , A.FREE_SMS_CNT --무료문자건수 , A.FREE_DATA_CNT --무료데이터건수 , A.RMK --비고 , A.REGST_ID --등록자ID , A.REGST_DTTM --등록일시 , A.RVISN_ID --수정자ID , A.RVISN_DTTM --수정일시 , A.ONLINE_TYPE_CD --온라인유형코드 , A.AL_FLAG --알요금제 구분자 , B.SVC_REL_TP --가입유형 :c 가능: b 필수 (자동가입): d 가입불가 FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A , (SELECT RATE_CD,ADD_SVC_CD,SERVICE_TYPE, SVC_REL_TP FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD = (SELECT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND SVC_REL_TP <> 'D' ) B WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE= 'R' AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.RATE_CD = B.ADD_SVC_CD AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT RATE_CD FROM(SELECT DISTINCT RATE_CD FROM MSP_PROD_REL_MST@DL_MSP WHERE RATE_CD IN (SELECT DISTINCT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' ) BB WHERE A.RATE_CD = BB.RATE_CD ) ORDER BY A.BASE_AMT DESC, A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC

SELECT A.RATE_CD AS PRV_RATE_CD --요금제코드 , A.RATE_NM AS PRV_RATE_GRP_NM--요금제명 , A.BASE_AMT AS PRV_BASE_AMT--기본료 , A.RMK AS PRV_RMK--비고 , B.APP_START_DD --적용일시 , NVL(A.BASE_AMT,0)+(NVL(A.BASE_AMT,0)*0.1) AS BASE_VAT_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A , (SELECT * FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{ncn} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' ) B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.SOC AND a.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT PRV_RATE_GRP_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_NM , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , PRV_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , PRV_RATE_CD , PRV_RATE_NM , PRV_PTRN_RATE_YN , PRV_PAY_CL_CD , PRV_DATA_TYPE , PRV_RATE_TYPE , PRV_RMK , PRV_BASE_AMT , PRV_APPL_STRT_DT , PRV_APPL_END_DT , NXT_RATE_GRP_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_NM , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_CD , NXT_RATE_GRP_TYPE_NM , NXT_RATE_CD , NXT_RATE_NM , NXT_PTRN_RATE_YN , NXT_PAY_CL_CD , NXT_DATA_TYPE , NXT_RATE_TYPE , NXT_RMK , NXT_BASE_AMT , NXT_APPL_STRT_DT , NXT_APPL_END_DT , NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT,0)+(NVL(NXT_BASE_AMT,0)*0.1) AS BASE_VAT_AMT FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231' ORDER BY NXT_BASE_AMT DESC

SELECT NVL(SUM(RANTAL),0) FROM ( SELECT CEIL(-RANTAL * 1.1) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP A , MCP_ADDITION B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 수정12323 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' )

SELECT NVL(SUM(RANTAL),0) FROM ( SELECT CEIL(-RANTAL * 1.1) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP A , MCP_ADDITION B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 수정12323 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' )

SELECT /*MypageMapper.getPayMnthChargeAmt 월납부 통신요금 = 기본요금 - 할인요금 */ BASE_AMT , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(CEIL(-RANTAL * 1.1)),0) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP T1 , MCP_ADDITION T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.ADDITION_KEY = T2.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN T1.STRT_DT AND T1.END_DT AND T1.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 수정12323 AND T1.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND T1.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND T1.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND T1.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND T1.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND T1.USG_YN = 'Y' ) AS PROMOTION_DC_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A WHERE A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND a.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /*MypageMapper.getRateInfoListByPromotionDate 월납부 통신요금 = 기본요금 - 할인요금 */ BASE_AMT , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , ( SELECT NVL(SUM(ROUND(-RANTAL * 1.1, -1)),0) AS RANTAL FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP T1 , MCP_ADDITION T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.ADDITION_KEY = T2.ADDITION_KEY AND #{promotionDate} BETWEEN T1.STRT_DT AND T1.END_DT AND T1.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 수정12323 AND T1.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND T1.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND T1.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND T1.RATE_CD = A.RATE_CD AND T1.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND T1.USG_YN = 'Y' ) AS PROMOTION_DC_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP A WHERE a.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231'

SELECT APP_START_DD FROM( SELECT SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6) AS APP_START_DD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DECODE(SOC,#{soc},SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6)+1,SUBSTR(APP_START_DD,0,6)) DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE SERVICE_TYPE='P' AND CONTRACT_NUM= #{cntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' )WHERE RNUM=1

SELECT A.PARTNER_ID, A.PARTNER_NM, A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, CASE WHEN A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'N' THEN 0 WHEN A.RESULT_DTL_CD != '0000' then 0 ELSE A.POINT END AS PAY_POINT, DECODE(A.FULL_PAY_YN,'Y','완납','미납') AS FULL_PAY_YN, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0200' AND ETC1 = A.PARTNER_ID AND ETC2 = A.RESULT_DTL_CD) AS RESULT_DTL_CD FROM (SELECT A.PARTNER_ID, E.PARTNER_NM, A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, SUM(A.CAL_POINT) AS POINT, A.FULL_PAY_YN, A.RESULT_DTL_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST@DL_MSP A , MSP_PARTNER_MST@DL_MSP E WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = E.PARTNER_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.BILL_YM||'15' < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SEND_FLAG != 'B' GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, E.PARTNER_NM, A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.FULL_PAY_YN, A.RESULT_DTL_CD ) A ORDER BY A.BILL_YM DESC, A.PARTNER_ID DESC, A.SVC_CNTR_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT A.PARTNER_ID, E.PARTNER_NM, A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, SUM(A.CAL_POINT) AS CAL_POINT, A.FULL_PAY_YN, A.RESULT_DTL_CD FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST@DL_MSP A , MSP_PARTNER_MST@DL_MSP E WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = E.PARTNER_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.BILL_YM||'15' < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SEND_FLAG != 'B' GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, E.PARTNER_NM, A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.FULL_PAY_YN, A.RESULT_DTL_CD ) A ORDER BY A.BILL_YM DESC, A.PARTNER_ID DESC, A.SVC_CNTR_NO DESC

SELECT NVL(AGR_YN ,'N') AS AGR_YN, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS REGST_DTTM, TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A, MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT@DL_MSP B WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{contractNum} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN B.STRT_DTTM(+) AND B.END_DTTM(+) AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO=B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND ROWNUM=1
{CALL P_MSP_MRKT_AGR@DL_MSP(#{ctn}, #{mrktAgr}, #{personalInfoCollectAgree}, #{othersTrnsAgree}, #{othersTrnsKtAgree}, #{othersAdReceiveAgree}, 'MCP', #{userId})}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP A, MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND B.PAY_CL_CD = 'PP'

SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,'ALL' AS reqBuyType ,COMMEND_ID ,COUNT(1) AS sumCount FROM ( SELECT COMMEND_ID , T2.CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 0, 6) AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND T1 , MCP_REQUEST T2 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T3 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T2.REQUEST_KEY AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM = T3.CONTRACT_NUM AND COMMEND_ID = #{commendId} AND T1.SYS_RDATE > TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'yyyy-mm') || '-01' , 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL AND T3.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' ) GROUP BY LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,COMMEND_ID

SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,'ALL' AS reqBuyType ,COMMEND_ID ,COUNT(1) AS sumCount FROM ( SELECT COMMEND_ID , T2.CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSTR(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 0, 6) AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND T1 , MCP_REQUEST T2 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T3 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T2.REQUEST_KEY AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM = T3.CONTRACT_NUM AND COMMEND_ID = #{commendId} AND T1.SYS_RDATE > TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'yyyy-mm') || '-01' , 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL AND T3.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' ) GROUP BY LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,COMMEND_ID UNION SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ,'INTER' AS reqBuyType ,#{internetId} as COMMEND_ID ,COUNT(1) AS sumCount FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYYMM') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , SVC_CNTR_ID FROM MDS_INET_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND STATUS = '사용중' AND INTERNET_ID = #{internetId} AND TO_DATE(OPEN_DT , 'yyyy-mm-dd') > TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'yyyy-mm') || '-01' , 'yyyy-mm-dd') ) GROUP BY LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ORDER BY LST_COM_ACTV_DATE

SELECT DISTINCT COMMEND_ID , REQ_BUY_TYPE , T2.CONTRACT_NUM , LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND T1 , MCP_REQUEST T2 , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR T4 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T3 , ( SELECT DECODE(S1.CSTMR_TYPE,'FN',S2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, S2.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN_DE FROM MCP_REQUEST S1 , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR S2 WHERE 1=1 AND S1.REQUEST_KEY = S2.REQUEST_KEY AND S1.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MCP_COMMEND_ID_MNG WHERE COMMEND_ID = #{commendId}) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) T5 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T2.REQUEST_KEY AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T4.REQUEST_KEY AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM = T3.CONTRACT_NUM AND COMMEND_ID = #{commendId} AND TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(#{lstComActvDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND T2.CONTRACT_NUM IS NOT NULL AND T3.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND DECODE(T2.CSTMR_TYPE,'FN',T4.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, T4.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) <> T5.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN_DE -- 동일 사용자 제외 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE 1= 1 AND CD_GROUP_ID = 'FqcInviteExceptionPlanList' AND DTL_CD = ( SELECT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = T2.CONTRACT_NUM AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM =1 ) ) -- 공통 코드[FqcInviteExceptionPlanList 프리퀀시 친구초대 예외 요금제 리스트 ] 없는 요금제만.. 인정
SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))

SELECT /*Mypage.selectCntrListNoLogin 계약 현행화 정보 */ A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.MODEL_NAME , A.MODEL_ID , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CNTR_MOBILE_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.DOBYYYYMMDD , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS USER_NAME , A.USER_SSN AS unUserSSn , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , B.CUSTOMER_ID , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , A.PPPO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID
AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{cntrMobileNo})
AND UPPER(REPLACE(A.SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{subLinkName},' ',''))
AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'

SELECT EXPIRATION_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SOC = #{soc} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(EFFECTIVE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),#{intAddMonths}) AND ROWNUM = 1
{CALL P_MCP_MRKT_AGR_NEW(#{userId},#{emailAgrYn},#{smsAgrYn})}
{CALL P_MCP_MRKT_AGR(#{userId},#{emailAgrYn},#{smsAgrYn})}
{CALL P_MCP_RATE_CHG(#{chgSeq}, #{contractNum})}

SELECT /*Mypage.getChannelInfo 개통 채널정보 */ SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS AGENT_CD , CMN.CD_DSC AS AGENT_NM , CMN.ETC1 AS CHANNEL_CD , CMN.ETC2 AS CHANNEL_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP CMN WHERE SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'RCP9031' AND CMN.USG_YN = 'Y' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /*Mypage.getCloseSubList 해지 해야할 부가 서비스 리스트 */ CMN.CD_DSC AS SOC_NM , FEA.SOC AS SOC_CODE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP FEA , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP CMN , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE 1=1 AND FEA.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND FEA.SOC = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'RCP9030' AND CMN.USG_YN = 'Y' AND EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM= #{contractNum} AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY SOC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VW_GROUP_BY_RATE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE PRV_RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND NXT_APPL_END_DT = '99991231'

SELECT /*Mypage.getromotionDcList 가입 해야할 부가 서비스 리스트 */ DISTINCT B.SOC AS SOC_CODE , ADDITION_NAME AS SOC_NM , RANTAL AS SOC_PRICE , A.PRMT_ID FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP A , MCP_ADDITION B WHERE 1=1 AND A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd} --요금제코드 AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /*Mypage.getEnggInfo 약정정보 */
CONTRACT_NUM -- 계약번호 , SUBSCRIBER_NO -- 전화번호 , APP_END_DATE -- 약정종료일자 appEndDate , CASE WHEN APP_END_DATE < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'N' WHEN APP_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' WHEN APP_END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' END AS ENGG_YN -- 약정여부
FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM ,SUBSCRIBER_NO ,ENGG_END_DT AS APP_END_DATE FROM VW_CNTR_ENGG_SELF@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )

SELECT EXPIRATION_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND SOC = #{soc} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(EFFECTIVE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(EXPIRATION_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),#{intAddMonths}) AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT RPMT.PRMT_TEXT AS PRMT_NM , GIFT.PRDT_NM , TO_CHAR(REQ.REGST_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT@DL_MSP REQ INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP GIFT ON REQ.PRDT_ID = GIFT.PRDT_ID --AND USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP RPMT ON RPMT.PRMT_ID = REQ.PRMT_ID WHERE REQ.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ORDER BY REQ.REGST_DTTM DESC

SELECT count(*) FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT@DL_MSP REQ INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRDT@DL_MSP GIFT ON REQ.PRDT_ID = GIFT.PRDT_ID --AND USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT@DL_MSP RPMT ON RPMT.PRMT_ID = REQ.PRMT_ID WHERE REQ.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT T2.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO , T2.USER_SSN AS CUSTOMER_SSN , T2.GENDER , T2.CONTRACT_NUM , T2.CUSTOMER_ID , T1.CUSTOMER_TYPE , T1.LEGAL_CI FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo}) AND UPPER(REPLACE(T2.SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))
SELECT BAN FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM =#{contractNum}

SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS SUB_LINK_NM , CASE WHEN DTL.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' OR DTL.CSTMR_TYPE = 'PP' THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) END AS GENDER , CASE WHEN DTL.CSTMR_TYPE = 'JP' OR DTL.CSTMR_TYPE = 'PP' THEN 0 ELSE FN_GET_AGE_JAVA@DL_MSP(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(SUB.USER_SSN)) END AS AGE , SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD , DTL.ON_OFF_TYPE , CASE WHEN MSD.REQ_USIM_SN IS NOT NULL THEN '직영온라인' ELSE PUM.ORGN_ID END AS ORG_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP DTL , MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY MSD , MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST@DL_MSP PUM WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.ICC_ID = MSD.REQ_USIM_SN(+) AND DTL.FST_USIM_NO = PUM.USIM_NO(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: /*Mypage.insertPrvCommData 통신자료 제공내역 신청 insert */ INSERT INTO MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP ( APY_SEQ --신청일련번호 , APY_NM --신청자이름 , BTHDAY --생년월일 (YYYYMMDD) , GENDER --성별 (1:남, 2:여) , SBSC_PRDT_CD --가입상품 (01:모바일) , CNTC_TEL_NO --연락처번호 , TGT_SVC_NO --대상서비스번호 , RECP_EMAIL --수령이메일 , CONF_SBST01_YN --요청기간 , CONF_SBST02_YN --제공일자 , CONF_SBST03_YN --요청사유 , CONF_SBST04_YN --제공내역 , MYSLF_ATHN_CI --본인인증CI , APY_ID --신청자ID , APY_DT --신청일시 , RESULT_YN --처리결과 , CONTRACT_NUM ) SELECT SQ_COMM_DAT_PRV_SEQ.NEXTVAL@DL_MSP , B.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN),7,1) IN ('1','2','5','6') THEN '19' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN),1,6) ELSE '20' || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN),1,6) END , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN),7,1) , '01' , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,1,3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,4,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,8,4) , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , '' , 'Y' , 'Y' , 'Y' , 'Y' , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI , #{apyId} , SYSDATE , '' , #{contractNum} FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: /*Mypage.pvcCommDataDtlList 통신자료 제공내역상세 출력정보 가져오기 */ SELECT (SELECT APY_NM FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS APY_NM , (SELECT BTHDAY FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS BTHDAY , (SELECT TO_CHAR(APY_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS APY_DT , (SELECT TGT_SVC_NO FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS TGT_SVC_NO , (SELECT CNTC_TEL_NO FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS CNTC_TEL_NO , (SELECT DECODE(SBSC_PRDT_CD,'01','모바일','') FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN@DL_MSP WHERE APY_SEQ = #{apySeq}) AS SBSC_PRDT_CD , A.PROC_DT , A.INVST_NM , DECODE(A.REQ_TYPE,'10','이용자확인','') AS REQ_RSN , A.CSTMR_NM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES@DL_MSP(A.USER_SSN) AS USER_SSN , A.OPEN_DT , A.SUB_STATUS , A.TMNT_DT , A.CSTMR_ADDR , A.REQ_DTTM ---- 요청일자 FROM MSP_INVST_REQ_MST@DL_MSP A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC

/*Mypage.selectOwnPhoNumList */ SELECT T2.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , SUBSTR(T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO,1,3) || '-' || SUBSTR(T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO,4,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(T2.SUBSCRIBER_NO,8,4) AS CNTR_MOBILE_NO , SUBSTR(T2.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,1,4) || '.' || SUBSTR(T2.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,5,2) || '.' || SUBSTR(T2.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,7,2) AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CUSTOMER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(#{cstmrNativeRrn}) AND CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME = #{cstmrName} ) T1 , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T2 WHERE T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T2.CUSTOMER_ID AND T2.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' ORDER BY T2.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ASC
mapper.update: /*Mypage.insertOwnPhoNumChkHst */ INSERT INTO NMCP_OWN_PHO_NUM_HST ( HST_SEQ , CSTMR_NAME , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , CSTMR_TYPE , ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , SYS_RDATE ) SELECT NMCP_OWN_PHO_NUM_HST_SEQ.NEXTVAL , A.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.CUSTOMER_SSN , A.CUSTOMER_TYPE , #{onlineAuthType} , #{onlineAuthInfo} , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID ,CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME ,CUSTOMER_SSN ,CUSTOMER_TYPE ,RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_SSN, CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) CNT FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP ) A WHERE A.CUSTOMER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(#{cstmrNativeRrn}) AND A.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME = #{cstmrName} AND A.CNT = 1
mapper.select: /*MypageMapper.getInsrInfo 안심보험가입여부조회 */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, B.INSR_STAT_CD, C.INSR_PROD_CD AS ORDER_EXIST, D.CONTRACT_NUM AS REQUEST_EXIST FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP A, MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER@DL_MSP B, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER@DL_MSP WHERE 1 = 1 AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND IF_TRGT_CD NOT IN ('C', 'F') AND TO_DATE(STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ROWNUM = 1) C, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQ_TYPE = 'IS' AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ROWNUM = 1) D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{CONTRACTNUM} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND (B.INSR_STAT_CD <> 2 OR B.INSR_STAT_CD IS NULL)

/*MypageMapper.getInsrInfoByCd 안심보험정보조회(by insrCd) */ SELECT RATE_CD INSR_CD, RATE_NM INSR_NAME, TO_CHAR(BASE_AMT, 'FM999,999,999') AS INSR_PRICE FROM MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP WHERE 1 = 1 AND RATE_CD = #{insrCd}

/*Mypage.getReqInsrData 안심보험 가입신청 내역 조회(서식지만들기용) */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.REQ_TYPE, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.CSTMR_NAME, A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS INSR_AUTH_INFO, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY') AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'MM') AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD, B.INSR_PROD_CD FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST A, MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER@DL_MSP B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REQ_TYPE = 'IS' AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custRequestSeq} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.IF_TRGT_CD = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY B.REGST_DTTM ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

WITH RWD_ORDER AS ( SELECT RWD_SEQ, RWD_PROD_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, IF_TRGT_CD, VRFY_RSLT_CD FROM (SELECT RWD_SEQ, RWD_PROD_CD, CONTRACT_NUM, IF_TRGT_CD, VRFY_RSLT_CD FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM=#{contractNum} ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC) WHERE ROWNUM=1 ) SELECT RD.CONTRACT_NUM , RD.REQ_BUY_TYPE , RO.IF_TRGT_CD , RO.VRFY_RSLT_CD , NVL(RM.RWD_SEQ, 0) AS RWD_SEQ , NVL2(RM.RWD_SEQ, RM.RWD_PROD_CD, RO.RWD_PROD_CD) AS RWD_PROD_CD , RM.RWD_STAT_CD , RM.CAN_RSLT_CD , RM.END_DTTM FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MSP RD , RWD_ORDER RO , MSP_RWD_MEMBER@DL_MSP RM WHERE RD.CONTRACT_NUM= #{contractNum} AND RD.CONTRACT_NUM = RO.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND RO.RWD_SEQ = RM.RWD_SEQ(+)

SELECT DISTINCT A.RWD_PROD_CD , A.RWD_PRD , B.CD_DSC AS RWD_PROD_NM , B.ETC5 FROM MSP_RWD_MST@DL_MSP A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE B.GRP_ID= 'CMN0258' AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND 1=0
AND 1=1
AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = #{rwdProdCd}
ORDER BY B.ETC5

SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.REQUEST_KEY , B.RES_NO , B.CSTMR_TYPE , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP A , MCP_REQUEST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM= B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) ORDER BY B.SYS_RDATE DESC, B.REQUEST_KEY DESC

SELECT COUNT(RWD_SEQ) AS CNT FROM MSP_RWD_MEMBER@DL_MSP RM WHERE (RM.RWD_STAT_CD = '1' OR RM.RWD_STAT_CD = '0' OR CAN_RSLT_CD= 'EXP')
AND (RM.IMEI= #{imei} OR RM.IMEI_TWO= #{imei} OR RM.IMEI= #{imeiTwo} OR RM.IMEI_TWO=#{imeiTwo})
AND (RM.IMEI= #{imei} OR RM.IMEI_TWO= #{imei})
AND (RM.IMEI= #{imeiTwo} OR RM.IMEI_TWO= #{imeiTwo})
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_RWD_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MSP, '000000')) AS FILE_NM_SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.RWD_PROD_CD, A.RWD_AUTH_INFO, A.CONTRACT_NUM, SUBSTR(B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 4, 4)|| '-' || SUBSTR(B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 8, 4) AS RWD_MOBILE_NO, B.USER_SSN AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, NVL(C.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME,B.SUB_LINK_NAME) AS CSTMR_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY') AS REQUEST_YEAR, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'MM') AS REQUEST_MONTH, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'DD') AS REQUEST_DAY, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_REG_FLAG, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_PAYMENT_FLAG, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_RATING_FLAG, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_USE_FLAG, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_PRIVACY_INFO_FLAG, 'Y' AS CLAUSE_RWD_TRUST_FLAG FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER@DL_MSP A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP C WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM=B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CUSTOMER_ID=C.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.RWD_SEQ=#{rwdSeq}

SELECT AGR_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, TO_CHAR(MRKT_RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as agrYnTime, TO_CHAR(PERSONAL_INFO_RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as personalInfoCollectAgreeTime, TO_CHAR(OTHERS_TRNS_RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as othersTrnsAgreeTime, TO_CHAR(OTHERS_TRNS_KT_RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as othersTrnsKtAgreeTime, TO_CHAR(OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as othersAdReceiveAgreeTime FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'AD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_AD.NEXTVAL@DL_MSP, '000000')) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_APD@DL_MSP ( APD_SEQ, REGST_DT, PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM,
PRMT_ID,
CHNL_CD, EVNT_CD, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, PRMT_AGNT_CD, RATE_CD, ON_OFF_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT #{apdSeq}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DT, 'N' AS PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM,
#{prmtId} AS PRMT_ID,
'01' AS CHNL_CD, 'SCH' AS EVNT_CD, '00' AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT, OPEN_AGNT_CD, '1100011741' AS PRMT_AGNT_CD, #{socCode} AS RATE_CD, '0' AS ON_OFF_TYPE, 'MNP3' AS OPER_TYPE, 'UU' AS REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MCP' AS REGST_ID, SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT(PRMT_ID) /* MypageMapper.getChrgPrmtIdSocChg 요금제 변경 온라인 프로모션ID 조회 */ FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL@DL_MSP WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN STRT_DT AND END_DT AND ORGN_ID = '1100011741' --접점코드_직영온라인 AND REQ_BUY_TYPE IN('UU','AL') -- 유심 AND ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' --무약정 AND MNP_YN = 'Y' AND ON_OFF_TYPE = '0' --온라인오프라인구분 (온라인 ) AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , T1.SUBSCRIBER_NO , T1.USER_SSN , T1.SUB_LINK_NAME , T2.BL_BILLING_METHOD , T2.BAN , T1.CUSTOMER_ID , T1.SUB_STATUS , T3.CUSTOMER_TYPE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP T1 , MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO@DL_MSP T2 , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO@DL_MSP T3 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.BAN = T2.BAN AND T1.CUSTOMER_ID = T3.CUSTOMER_ID AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
AND SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{mobileNo})
AND UPPER(REPLACE(SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{name},' ',''))
AND USER_SSN = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES@DL_MSP(#{userSsn})

SELECT /* MypageMapper.selectMinorAgentInfo */ MEM.FAM_SEQ, MEM.SEQ, SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AS MINOR_AGENT_SVC_CNTR_NO, MEM.MEM_TYPE, MEM.CHILD_TYPE, MEM.USE_YN, MEM.STRT_DTTM, MEM.END_DTTM FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MST@DL_MSP MST, MSP_FAM_REL_MEM@DL_MSP MEM, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{minorAgentSvcCntrNo} AND MST.FAM_SEQ = MEM.FAM_SEQ AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AND MEM.MEM_TYPE = '10' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MST.STRT_DTTM AND MST.END_DTTM AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MEM.STRT_DTTM AND MEM.END_DTTM AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND MST.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /* MypageMapper.selectChildCntrList */ MST.FAM_SEQ, SEQ, SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO, SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, SUB.CUSTOMER_ID, SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS NAME, SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO, MEM.MEM_TYPE, MEM.CHILD_TYPE, MEM.USE_YN FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MST@DL_MSP MST, MSP_FAM_REL_MEM@DL_MSP MEM, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE MST.FAM_SEQ = #{famSeq} AND MST.FAM_SEQ = MEM.FAM_SEQ AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND MEM.MEM_TYPE = '20' AND MST.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MST.STRT_DTTM AND MST.END_DTTM AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MEM.STRT_DTTM AND MEM.END_DTTM ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT /* MypageMapper.selectChildCntr */ SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO, SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS NAME, SUB.CUSTOMER_ID, SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO, MEM.MEM_TYPE FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MST@DL_MSP MST, MSP_FAM_REL_MEM@DL_MSP MEM, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE 1=1 AND MST.FAM_SEQ = ( SELECT A.FAM_SEQ FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MEM@DL_MSP A WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{minorAgentSvcCntrNo} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.MEM_TYPE = '10' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.STRT_DTTM AND A.END_DTTM ) AND MST.FAM_SEQ = MEM.FAM_SEQ AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO AND MST.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.MEM_TYPE = '20' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MST.STRT_DTTM AND MST.END_DTTM AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN MEM.STRT_DTTM AND MEM.END_DTTM AND SUB.SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
